calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David P. Adams, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West, a California Banking Corporation doing business through its Trinity Division.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Cleveland Dental Inc., an Oklahoma Corporation; Steven D. Oliver, an individual.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $37,286.62
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $1,105.75
Costs: $673.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $39,065.67
Plaintiff Bank of the West is to recover from Cleveland Dental, Inc. and Steven D. Oliver possession of the personal property described on Attachment 1 (See scanned document). If Bank of the West obtains possession of the described property and sells it at a sale, Bank of the West shall apply the proceeds from any such sale, net of any sale and recovery expenses, to reduce the amount owed by Cleveland Dental, Inc. and Steven D. Oliver under this Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
